title: Jay Epstein
compiled_truth: Jay Epstein is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-06-07 to 2001-11-27), Jay Epstein sent 2 and received 54 emails, totalling 56 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (2), [Joe Jure](people/joe-jure) (1), [Fruiztagle](people/fruiztagle-gerencia) (1).
